description:
Convert new/1 function to single-line do: syntax

Current:
```elixir
def new(opts) do
  struct!(__MODULE__, opts)
end
```

Target:
```elixir
def new(opts), do: struct!(__MODULE__, opts)
```

File: apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/config.ex
title: Convert config.ex to do: syntax
